title: Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Pro-8-PoE
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: The Ubiquiti USW-Pro-8-PoE is a new switch that offers up to 6 POE/POE+ ports capable of delivering up to 30 W, as well as 2 POE++ ports that can deliver up to 60 W. The total maximum output power is 120 W. The switch has 2 SFP+ ports with speeds up to 10 Gbps, which is ideal for transferring even larger files. On the front of the switch you will find a touch control panel with AR settings as well. The switch can also be mounted on the wall with the appropriate bracket Support new POE++ Very speed SFP+ ports with 10 Gbps Support L3 Maximum output power 120W for POE Can be mounted on the wall
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, 802.3bt PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 120 Max. power consumption [W] 150 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC (directly to the wall outlet) Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 45 Width [mm] 248 Height [mm] 200 Depth [mm] 44 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 56
